"use client"; import React, { useEffect, useState } from "react"; import Link from "next/link"; import { useRouter } from "next/navigation"; export default function AdminDashboardPage() { const [stats, setStats] = useState(null); const router = useRouter(); useEffect(() => { const token = localStorage.getItem("adminToken") || ""; fetch(`${process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL || 'http://localhost:3001/api/v1'}/admin/dashboard-stats`, { headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${token}` } }) .then(async (res) => { const statsData = await res.json(); if (statsData.success) setStats(statsData.data); }) .catch(); }, []); return (
{/* Header handled by AdminLayout, we just add the page title if needed or assume layout handles it. Recreating the specific title here if missing. */} {/* Stats Grid */}

Total Bookings

calendar_month

{stats?.todaysBookings?.total || "1,245"}

+12%

Active Pandits

groups

{stats?.activePandits?.verified || "512"}

+5%

Live Travels

commute

42

-2%

Revenue

payments

₹{stats?.monthlyRevenue?.current ? (stats.monthlyRevenue.current / 100000).toFixed(1) + 'L' : "82.4L"}

+{stats?.monthlyRevenue?.percentChange || 18}%

{/* Live Map Section */}

Live Pandit Journeys (Central India)

On Time Minor Delay Critical
{/* Interactive Elements Simulation */}
{/* Red Alert Section */}
warning

Red Alert Monitor

{/* Delayed Item 1 */}

Pandit Sharma Ji

45m DELAY

Route: Indore -> Ujjain (Mahakal Puja)

Backup Status: READY
{/* Delayed Item 2 */}

Pandit Dubey Ji

20m DELAY

Route: Bhopal -> Vidisha (Havan)

Backup Status: PENDING
{/* Recent Activity Table */}

Live Travel Operations Log

Pandit ID Service Type Current Location ETA to Destination Risk Status Action
#PJ-4512 Griha Pravesh Puja Dewas Bypass 12 mins LOW
#PJ-9821 Satyanarayan Katha Raisen Road 34 mins MEDIUM
#PJ-1102 Vastu Shanti MP Nagar Ph-II 5 mins LOW
); }

"use client"; import React, { useState } from "react"; import { Card, CardContent, CardHeader, CardTitle, CardDescription } from "@hmarepanditji/ui/components/ui/card"; import { Button } from "@hmarepanditji/ui/components/ui/button"; import { Input } from "@hmarepanditji/ui/components/ui/input"; import { Label } from "@hmarepanditji/ui/components/ui/label"; export default function SettingsPage() { const [saving, setSaving] = useState(false); // In Phase 1, these are "display-only" but we allow editing to show it works in UI. // They aren't actually saved to backend yet according to instructions. const [settings, setSettings] = useState({ platformFee: 15, travelFee: 5, samagriFee: 10, backupGuarantee: 9999, foodDaily: 1000, refund7: 90, refund3_7: 50, refund1_3: 20, refund0: 0, mockMode: false, smsProvider: "Twilio" }); const handleChange = (key: string, value: any) => { setSettings(prev => ({ ...prev, [key]: value })); }; const saveSettings = () => { setSaving(true); // Simulate API call for saving settings setTimeout(() => { alert("Settings saved successfully! (Note: Core functionality uses hardcoded values in Phase 1)"); setSaving(false); }, 800); }; return (

Platform Settings

Configure core application rules and fees

Commission Rates Configure platform take rates
handleChange("platformFee", Number(e.target.value))} />
handleChange("travelFee", Number(e.target.value))} />
handleChange("samagriFee", Number(e.target.value))} />
handleChange("backupGuarantee", Number(e.target.value))} />
Food & Accommodation Standard allowances if customer doesn't provide
handleChange("foodDaily", Number(e.target.value))} />
Cancellation Policy Refund percentage based on days until event
handleChange("refund7", Number(e.target.value))} />
handleChange("refund3_7", Number(e.target.value))} />
handleChange("refund1_3", Number(e.target.value))} />
handleChange("refund0", Number(e.target.value))} disabled className="bg-muted text-muted-foreground" /> Always 0% defaults
System & Notifications Developer tools and integrations

When enabled, SMS and Payments use dummy simulation.

handleChange("mockMode", e.target.checked)} />

Active service for delivering SMS (Read-Only).
); }

"use client"; import React, { useState } from "react"; interface TravelCalculatorModalProps { booking: any; onClose: () => void; onSave: (data: any) => void; } export default function TravelCalculatorModal({ booking, onClose, onSave }: TravelCalculatorModalProps) { const [cost, setCost] = useState(0); const [returnCost, setReturnCost] = useState(0); const [localCab, setLocalCab] = useState(0); const [accommodation, setAccommodation] = useState(0); const [notes, setNotes] = useState(""); const totalCost = cost + returnCost + localCab + accommodation; const handleSave = () => { onSave({ calculatedTravelCost: totalCost, travelNotes: notes, travelBreakdown: { outbound: cost, return: returnCost, localCab, accommodation } }); }; return (

Calculate Travel Cost

setReturnCost(parseInt(e.target.value) || 0)} placeholder="e.g. 1500" className="w-full border border-slate-200 rounded-xl px-4 py-2.5 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500 font-medium text-slate-800" />
setLocalCab(parseInt(e.target.value) || 0)} placeholder="e.g. 500" className="w-full border border-slate-200 rounded-xl px-4 py-2.5 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500 font-medium text-slate-800" />
setAccommodation(parseInt(e.target.value) || 0)} placeholder="e.g. 2000" className="w-full border border-slate-200 rounded-xl px-4 py-2.5 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500 font-medium text-slate-800" />
